---
description: Example theme demonstrating scaffold patterns for INIT-FIXTURE-1
---

# Example Theme

This theme was consulted during the INIT-FIXTURE-1 initiative to establish scaffold patterns for the claude-trail tooling.

## Key patterns

- Frozen fixture data enables deterministic integration tests.
- Golden files capture expected CLI output byte-for-byte.
- Subprocess-based tests verify the full pipeline end-to-end.
